headlines.title: SCSP launches National Security Commission on Robotics for Advanced Manufacturing
headlines.summary: SCSP, the Special Competitive Studies Project, is leading study and U.S. policy recommendations on training, robotics and AI adoption, and supply chain resilience.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, robotik uygulamalarin laboratuvar asamasindan cikip gercek operasyonlara daha fazla girdigini gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Robotik gercek dunyaya indiginde verimlilik, uretim yapisi ve is gucu dengesi degisir. Bu sinyal özellikle robot, robotics ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

headlines.title: MassRobotics to promote ecosystem growth at 2026 Robotics Summit & Expo
headlines.summary: MassRobotics will spotlight resident, physical AI, and healthcare startups, as well as women in robotics and university teams at the 2026 Robotics Summit.

headlines.title: Amazon CEO says robotics is key for faster delivery, lower costs
headlines.summary: Amazon now has over 1 million robots operating in fulfillment centers, helping with stowing, picking, sorting, and intra-facility transport.

political_items.title: Government Contracts and Robust Liquidity Fuel Maximus' Growth
political_items.summary: MMS benefits from strong government partnerships, cash flow and dividend payouts, but regulatory risks and heavy government contract reliance dampen growth.

political_items.title: 'We need real peace': Easter truce fails to lift grim mood in war-torn Ukraine
political_items.summary: Easter festivities are muted in Kharkiv as Ukrainians expect fighting to flare up again after a weekend truce.

political_items.title: Why this disillusioned Trump voter spends hours searching Epstein files
political_items.summary: Many who support the president have expressed frustration with how Trump's former attorney general Pam Bondi handled the Epstein files.

political_items.title: Djibouti's president wins unprecedented sixth term with 97.8% of vote
political_items.summary: Ismail Omar Guelleh, 78, has extended his already 27-year rule in a poll boycotted by the main opposition candidates.
